narrative_text: [HIGH] Privilege Abuse incident detected for Kimberly Reed on multiple. This identity was flagged by the ensemble anomaly detection model as a statistical outlier, with a risk score of 63.1/100. Key contributing factors include: excessive admin privileges, mfa disabled, high cross platform exposure. Attack path analysis shows a blast radius score of 89.0/100, spanning 27 reachable resources. Applying REVOKE_ROLE would reduce blast radius to 39.6 (55.6% reduction). Root cause: Identity holds 27 ADMIN/FULL_CONTROL privileges across 4 resource platform(s); 22% are provisioned but unused — classic over-provisioning.
rationale_text: Recommended action: REVOKE_ROLE (priority: high, effort: moderate). Revoking the highest-privilege role reduces administrative access to only what is required for the identity's current business function, directly enforcing least-privilege principles. Estimated risk reduction: 46.5%. Blast radius reduction: 55.6%. This action requires management approval. Basis: Identity holds 27 ADMIN/FULL_CONTROL privileges across 4 resource platform(s); 22% are provisioned but unused — classic over-provisioning.
